dict.string: Sumi reads your calendar to brief you before meetings and prep you for who you're meeting.
Sumi creates reminders for the things you tell it you need to follow up on.
Sumi looks up the people you mention so it can give you context on your history with them.
Sumi uses speech recognition so you can talk to it through Siri and in the app.
Sumi uses the microphone so you can talk to it instead of typing.
